lines.english: The Transcendent Lord God has become merciful;
Malaar, Fifth Mehl:
Nanak is forever a sacrifice to them. ||4||2||20||
their affairs are perfectly resolved. ||1||
All beings and creatures are satisfied;
O my mind, dwell on the Lord, forever and ever.
Ambrosial Nectar is raining down from the clouds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪੂਰੇ ਕੀ ਸੇਵਾ ਪਾਇਆ ਐਥੈ ਓਥੈ ਨਿਬਹੈ ਨਾਲਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur poore kee sevaa paaeaa aithai othai nibahai naal |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Serving the Perfect Guru, I have obtained it. It shall stay with me both here and hereafter. ||1||Pause||
He is the Destroyer of pain, the Eradicator of fear.
I am a sacrifice to Him, forever and ever. ||2||
The Savior Lord is kind and compassionate forever.
He takes care of His beings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਮਨ ਤਿਸ ਨੋ ਜਾਪਿ ॥
lines.translit: sadaa sadaa man tis no jaap |
lines.english: Meditate on Him forever and ever, O my mind.
The Creator Himself has eliminated death.
He watches all with His Glance of Grace and protects them.
Continually and continuously, sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord God. ||3||
The Lord's devotees know His Glorious Grandeur.
He preserves the Honor of His Name.
The One and Only Creator Lord is Himself by Himself.
Nanak speaks as the Lord inspires him to speak. ||4||3||21||
Malaar, Fifth Mehl:
All treasures are found in the Sanctuary of the Guru.
forever singing the Glorious Praises of the Lord in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭ੍ਰਮੁ ਭਉ ਦੂਖੁ ਦਰਦੁ ਸਭੁ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: bhram bhau dookh darad sabh jaae |
lines.english: Doubt, fear, pain and suffering are taken away,
Honor is obtained in the True Court of the Lord.
O my mind, praise the Perfect Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਜਪਹੁ ਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਤੀ ਮਨ ਚਿੰਦੇ ਫਲ ਪਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: naam nidhaan japahu din raatee man chinde fal paae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Chant the treasure of the Naam, the Name of the Lord, day and night. You shall obtain the fruits of your mind's desires. ||1||Pause||
No one else is as great as the True Guru.
The Guru is the Supreme Lord, the Transcendent Lord God.
He saves us from the pains of death and birth,
The Guru is the Transcendent Lord, in the True Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਬਿਖੁ ਫਿਰਿ ਬਹੁੜਿ ਨ ਚਾਖੈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: maaeaa bikh fir bahurr na chaakhai |2|
lines.english: and we will not have to taste the poison of Maya ever again. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਮਹਿਮਾ ਕਥਨੁ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: gur kee mahimaa kathan na jaae |
lines.english: The Guru's glorious grandeur cannot be described.
True is His self-discipline, and True are all His actions.
The Perfect Guru is obtained by great good fortune.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਮਨੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਜੋ ਗੁਰ ਸੰਗਿ ਰਾਚੀ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: so man niramal jo gur sang raachee |3|
lines.english: Immaculate and pure is that mind, which is imbued with love for the Guru. ||3||
By His Grace, the Guru's Feet are enshrined within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮੁ ਕ੍ਰੋਧੁ ਲੋਭੁ ਮਨ ਤੇ ਤਿਆਗਿ ॥
lines.translit: kaam krodh lobh man te tiaag |
lines.english: Drive out sexual desire, anger and greed from your mind.
Nanak offers his prayer to the True Lord God. ||4||4||22||
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
Raag Malaar, Fifth Mehl, Partaal, Third House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਮਨਾਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਿਅ ਦਇਆਰ ਸਿਉ ਰੰਗੁ ਕੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: gur manaar pria deaar siau rang keea |
lines.english: Pleasing the Guru, I have fallen in love with my Merciful Beloved Lord.
I have made all my decorations,
and renounced all corruption;

lines.gurmukhi: ਐਸੇ ਰੇ ਮਨ ਪਾਇ ਕੈ ਆਪੁ ਗਵਾਇ ਕੈ ਕਰਿ ਸਾਧਨ ਸਿਉ ਸੰਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: aise re man paae kai aap gavaae kai kar saadhan siau sang |
lines.english: O my mind, lose your self-conceit by associating with the Holy, and you shall find Him.
my wandering mind has become steady and stable. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਐਸੀ ਤੇਰੇ ਦਰਸਨ ਕੀ ਸੋਭ ਅਤਿ ਅਪਾਰ ਪ੍ਰਿਅ ਅਮੋਘ ਤੈਸੇ ਹੀ ਸੰਗਿ ਸੰਤ ਬਨੇ ॥
lines.translit: aisee tere darasan kee sobh at apaar pria amogh taise hee sang sant bane |
lines.english: Such is the glory of Your Darshan, so utterly inifinte and fruitful, O my Love; so do we become by associating with the Saints.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਜੇ ਬਜਹਿ ਮ੍ਰਿਦੰਗ ਅਨਾਹਦ ਕੋਕਿਲ ਰੀ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਬੋਲੈ ਮਧੁਰ ਬੈਨ ਅਤਿ ਸੁਹੀਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: baaje bajeh mridang anaahad kokil ree raam naam bolai madhur bain at suheea |1|
lines.english: The unstruck celestial melody vibrates and resounds; like a song-bird, chant the Lord's Name, with words of sweetness and utter beauty. ||1||
They dwell on the Lord, Raam, Raam, chanting on their malas;
Vibrating, chanting Your Name, we cross over the terrifying world-ocean.
